item.title: A Pewter Tavern Mug Discovery
item.description: A mudlarking discovery along a riverbank uncovers a pewter tavern mug, highlighting the excitement of finding historic items hidden in the mud. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Pewter Tavern Mug Discovery
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking discovery along a riverbank uncovers a pewter tavern mug, highlighting the excitement of finding historic items hidden in the mud. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Broken Finds with Hidden Character
item.description: A mudlarking adventure uncovering broken yet interesting artifacts, showing how even damaged items can hold historical value and surprises. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Broken Finds with Hidden Character
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking adventure uncovering broken yet interesting artifacts, showing how even damaged items can hold historical value and surprises. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Curious Find by Nicola White Tideline Art
item.description: A careful search leads to a surprising discovery that nearly went unnoticed, highlighting patience and attention during the find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A Curious Find by Nicola White Tideline Art
media:content.media:description: A careful search leads to a surprising discovery that nearly went unnoticed, highlighting patience and attention during the find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Detective Skills Put to the Test in Mudlarking
item.description: A mudlarking exploration where observation and deduction help uncover and identify interesting finds along the shoreline. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Detective Skills Put to the Test in Mudlarking
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking exploration where observation and deduction help uncover and identify interesting finds along the shoreline. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Nicola White Tideline Art uncovers metal in mud
item.description: A mudlarking discovery uncovers a large piece of metal buried in sediment, explored for its possible origin and historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Nicola White Tideline Art uncovers metal in mud
media:content.media:description: A mudlarking discovery uncovers a large piece of metal buried in sediment, explored for its possible origin and historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: River Thames Low Tide Reveals Curious Finds
item.description: A look at items uncovered along the River Thames during low tide, highlighting interesting and unusual discoveries from mudlarking. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: River Thames Low Tide Reveals Curious Finds
media:content.media:description: A look at items uncovered along the River Thames during low tide, highlighting interesting and unusual discoveries from mudlarking. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.
